meta.name: cloudstream-ai-knowledge
meta.description: Machine-readable quick reference for AI agents building Cloudstream extensions

errors_quick.search_multi_word_empty: Replace spaces with dashes in path-segment search URLs. URLEncoder + signs return 0 results on many sites
errors_quick.tvtypes_movies_not_nsfw: Set tvTypes=listOf("NSFW") in build.gradle.kts cloudstream block + supportedTypes=setOf(TvType.NSFW) in Provider
errors_quick.unsupported_escape_sequence: Use Regex("\\s+") not "\s+".toRegex() in regular Kotlin strings
errors_quick.unresolved_addActors: Use this.actors=listOf(...) not addActors() which doesn't exist in pre-release stubs
errors_quick.cloudflare_blocked: Switch to non-Cloudflare site. No reliable bypass from extension code
errors_quick.bracket_selectors_corrupted: Write files via Python not bash heredoc. [href gets eaten by shell
errors_quick.empty_mainpage: Set hasMainPage=true + implement getMainPage() + use correct CSS selectors for the site
errors_quick.cached_old_extension: User must uninstall old extension, remove repo, re-add repo, reinstall

app_limitations.tags_not_clickable: Cloudstream sets chip.isClickable=false on tags. No tag-click callback exists. WIP ITag API unused.
app_limitations.search_is_string_only: search(query:String) takes plain string only. No tag/filter/callback API.
app_limitations.addActors_not_in_stubs: Use this.actors property directly, not addActors() helper
app_limitations.no_cloudflare_bypass: No WebView or JS execution in extension. Cloudflare-protected sites are unusable.

tvtype_mapping.NSFW: Adult content. MUST use for porn sites or extension appears under Movies with no 18+ tag

search_encoding.query_param_plus: Some sites: ?q=hot+asian+teen (+ works in query params)
search_encoding.rule: ALWAYS test multi-word search before declaring it works

category_sources.homepage_navigation: Parse site's nav/menu for category links
category_sources.star_urls: /stars/{name} becomes a mainPage entry (same HTML as search usually)

mp4_extraction.url_prefix: If src starts with //, prefix https:
